messages.content: 国际代理商招募书，怎么翻译这句话
国际代理商招募，怎么翻译这句话
10余年沉淀，技术实力强、技术经验丰富。请用英文表达这句话。
"With over a decade of accumulation, we boast strong technical capabilities and rich experience in the field."
近三年平均研发投入强度达9.08%。请用英文表达这句话。
"The average R&D investment intensity over the past three years has reached 9.08%."
近三年平均研发投入强度达9.08%，研发投入复合增长率达83%。请用英文表达这句话。
"The average R&D investment intensity over the past three years has reached 9.08%, with a compound annual growth rate of 83% in R&D investment."
研发分为机械、电子两个板块，五个部门。请用英文表达这句话。
"The R&D is divided into two divisions, namely mechanical and electronic, consisting of five departments."
年轻的高学历研发团队，创新思维活跃
"We have a young and highly educated R&D team, known for their innovative thinking."
有机械加工、装配调试两个车间。请用英文表达这句话
"We have two workshops, one for mechanical processing and the other for assembly and debugging."
自主制造、高质量标准。请用英文表达这句话
"We emphasize independent manufacturing and adhere to high-quality standards."
